{{CargoRelic
|name=Color Bead No.6
|class_id=20071
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=This magical orb is produced in the mini-game, It Takes 5. The investors repeatedly stressed the importance of making players stay longer in the game, so the devs have no choice but to offer this Relic in the mini-game!
|fame=18
|art=13
|fth=17
|civ=27
|tech=15
|ss1=Lottery Green Orbs turn to Blue by +0.2%
|ss2=Lottery Green Orbs turn to Blue by +0.4%
|ss3=Lottery Green Orbs turn to Blue by +0.6%
|ss4=Lottery Green Orbs turn to Blue by +0.6%
|ss7=Lottery Green Orbs turn to Blue by +0.6%<br> (Awakened)
}}
